title: Kickoff
description: Introduce Loveable, explain vibe coding, set expectations, and outline the structure.
purpose: Remove intimidation and create clarity before ideas begin.

title: Sprint to the IdeaLab
description: Your chance to brainstorm, define and submit your project idea at IdeaLab.seven2.com
purpose: Commit to a direction and articulate why the idea matters to you.

title: Shark Tank, Minus the Sharks
description: Each participant delivers a 1-minute pitch with light feedback from the team.
purpose: Sharpen ideas and build collective energy.

title: Documentation Is Everything
description: Develop specifics around your idea using AI, ZERO.Prmptr.ai, IdeaLab, or all three.
purpose: Translate the idea into a low-prompt, buildable direction.

title: Here We Go!
subtitle: Build Session 1
description: It's time to start your project in Loveable!

title: Build Session 2
description: Protected build time with optional office hours.

title: Your Final Build Session
description: This is your last time-blocked build session.
purpose: Polish demo flow and prepare for showcase.

title: Showcase Showdown
description: Each participant presents a 3-minute demo followed by 2-minute Q&A.
purpose: Celebrate learning, reflect on insights, and capture takeaways.
